name: Marinade Finance MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Marinade Finance — the leading liquid staking protocol on Solana. Enables AI agents to interact with Marinade's staking services: checking mSOL (liquid staking token) rates, querying staking positions, monitoring validator performance, and accessing Marinade's DeFi staking data through MCP tool calls.
use_cases: Checking Marinade mSOL staking rates and APY from portfolio agents
Monitoring liquid staking positions on Solana from DeFi agents
Querying Marinade validator statistics from staking optimization agents
Integrating Marinade staking data into DeFi portfolio tracking from analytics agents
not_for: Non-Solana blockchain staking (Ethereum, Cosmos, etc. have different staking protocols)
Users without Solana wallet or SOL tokens
Teams needing CEX staking (Marinade is a decentralized protocol)
best_when: A Solana DeFi user or agent needs to track Marinade liquid staking positions and mSOL rates — monitoring staking yield and validator performance across the Marinade protocol.
avoid_when: You don't use Solana or aren't familiar with liquid staking concepts — Marinade is a niche Solana-specific DeFi protocol.

auth.notes: Read-only data queries may require no auth. Wallet interaction for staking operations requires Solana wallet connection. API key may be needed for certain Marinade endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Protocol data queries are free; staking transactions incur Solana network fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Marinade charges no additional fees for the MCP server itself
pricing.notes: Free MCP server. Marinade Finance takes a staking fee from yields (not transaction-based). Solana network fees (lamports) apply to on-chain transactions.

performance.rate_limits: Solana RPC rate limits may apply; Marinade API has standard limits

known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Staking transactions are irreversible on-chain — agents must not execute transactions without explicit user confirmation
mSOL/SOL exchange rates fluctuate — time-sensitive data needs fresh queries
Community MCP (not from Marinade's official org) — verify against official Marinade APIs
Solana network congestion can affect transaction finality — implement appropriate timeouts
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Any staking transactions are real on-chain actions with real SOL. Only perform read operations autonomously. Require explicit confirmation for any transaction execution. Community MCP — verify code before use with live wallets.

security_score_components.security_notes: Real on-chain financial transactions. Never execute staking transactions autonomously — always require user confirmation. Community (not official) Marinade MCP — audit code before connecting live wallets.
